nasb.text: in order to test Israel by them, whether they will keep the way of the Lord to walk in it as their fathers did, or not.”

esv.text: in order to test Israel by them, whether they will take care to walk in the way of the Lord as their fathers did, or not.”

cnv.text: 為要藉著他們試驗以色列人，看他們肯不肯謹守遵行耶和華的道路，像他們的列祖一樣謹守。”

ccb.text: 我要借此试验以色列人，看他们是否像他们祖先一样谨遵我的道。”
